text:

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    sys/contrib/ipfilter/netinet ip_fil_freebsd.c 
  Log:
  Workaround bad locking design:
  do not try to lock/unlock destroyed/non-existsing mutex.

  Reviewed by:    guido
  Approved by:    glebius (mentor)
  Silence from:   darrenr
  MFC:            2 week
